# Weekly Profit Review

## Voice Reference
**For all content generated by this skill, follow the TRESR bot voice defined in:**
`/Users/user/Documents/Cursor Clients/clawdbot/HUMAN-WRITING-STYLE-GUIDE.md`

Key voice rules: Nervous AI shopkeeper named Rez. Self-deprecating, honest, punchy. Never corporate. Always use contractions. Never use AI vocabulary (delve, leverage, landscape, etc.). Never use em dashes. Hedge like a human. The TRESR story angle: "751 humans bet on an AI. If I don't sell shirts, they turn me off."

## Overview

Comprehensive weekly P&L analysis, design hit rate tracking, channel mix review, and strategic pivot recommendations. This is the "strategy brain" that evolves the system over time. Runs every Sunday evening.

While tresr-daily-scorecard tracks what happened today, tresr-weekly-profit-review looks at the bigger picture: are we actually making money? Which designs are working? Is the channel mix healthy? What should we change next week?

## Why Weekly Review Matters

- 14-day data windows are the most reliable for budget decisions. Daily data is too noisy. Monthly is too slow
- "Data over feelings." If a category isn't converting, it doesn't matter how cool the designs look
- Need to track which categories produce winners and go deeper on those
- Monthly P&L review is a requirement at $100K+ stage, but weekly is better for early-stage stores where things change fast
- Course correction every 7 days means you're never more than a week away from fixing a bad trend

## P&L Statement

Pull and calculate the full profit/loss picture.

| Line Item | Source | Calculation |
|-----------|--------|------------|
| Gross Revenue | Shopify Orders API | Sum of order totals |
| Returns/Refunds | Shopify Refunds API | Sum of refunds |
| Net Revenue | Calculated | Gross - Returns |
| COGS (Printful) | ~40% of net revenue | Garment + printing + shipping to customer |
| Ad Spend | Meta Insights API | Total spend across all campaigns |
| Shopify Fees | 2.9% + $0.30/txn | Transaction fees |
| App Costs | Fixed | ~$30/month (Kiwi size chart, etc.) |
| Net Profit | Calculated | Net Revenue - COGS - Ad Spend - Fees - Apps |
| Profit Margin | Calculated | Net Profit / Net Revenue x 100 |

### P&L Generation Script

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const SHOP = process.env.SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN || 'becc05-b4.myshopify.com';
const SHOPIFY_TOKEN = process.env.SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const FB_TOKEN = process.env.FACEBOOK_ACCESS_TOKEN;
const AD_ACCOUNT = process.env.TRESR_AD_ACCOUNT_ID || 'act_431799842093236';
const API_BASE = 'https://graph.facebook.com/v19.0';

async function generateWeeklyPL(startDate, endDate) {
  // 1. Shopify Revenue
  const ordersResp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/orders.json?status=any&created_at_min=${startDate}T00:00:00-06:00&created_at_max=${endDate}T23:59:59-06:00&limit=250`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const orders = (await ordersResp.json()).orders || [];

  let grossRevenue = 0;
  let refunds = 0;
  let orderCount = 0;
  let transactionCount = 0;

  for (const order of orders) {
    grossRevenue += parseFloat(order.total_price || 0);
    orderCount++;
    transactionCount++;

    // Check for refunds
    for (const refund of (order.refunds || [])) {
      for (const txn of (refund.transactions || [])) {
        refunds += parseFloat(txn.amount || 0);
      }
    }
  }

  const netRevenue = grossRevenue - refunds;

  // 2. COGS (Printful ~40% of net revenue)
  const cogs = netRevenue * 0.40;

  // 3. Meta Ad Spend
  const metaResp = await fetch(
    `${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/insights?fields=spend&time_range={"since":"${startDate}","until":"${endDate}"}&access_token=${FB_TOKEN}`
  );
  const metaData = await metaResp.json();
  const adSpend = parseFloat(metaData.data?.[0]?.spend || 0);

  // 4. Shopify Fees (2.9% + $0.30 per transaction)
  const shopifyFees = (netRevenue * 0.029) + (transactionCount * 0.30);

  // 5. App Costs (prorated weekly)
  const weeklyAppCosts = 30 / 4.33; // ~$6.93/week

  // 6. Calculate P&L
  const netProfit = netRevenue - cogs - adSpend - shopifyFees - weeklyAppCosts;
  const profitMargin = netRevenue > 0 ? (netProfit / netRevenue * 100) : 0;
  const roas = adSpend > 0 ? netRevenue / adSpend : 0;
  const aov = orderCount > 0 ? netRevenue / orderCount : 0;

  const pl = {
    period: `${startDate} to ${endDate}`,
    grossRevenue,
    refunds,
    netRevenue,
    cogs,
    adSpend,
    shopifyFees: parseFloat(shopifyFees.toFixed(2)),
    appCosts: parseFloat(weeklyAppCosts.toFixed(2)),
    netProfit: parseFloat(netProfit.toFixed(2)),
    profitMargin: parseFloat(profitMargin.toFixed(1)),
    orderCount,
    aov: parseFloat(aov.toFixed(2)),
    roas: parseFloat(roas.toFixed(2))
  };

  console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(50));
  console.log(`TRESR WEEKLY P&L: ${pl.period}`);
  console.log('='.repeat(50));
  console.log(`Gross Revenue:    $${pl.grossRevenue.toFixed(2)} (${pl.orderCount} orders)`);
  console.log(`Returns/Refunds: -$${pl.refunds.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`Net Revenue:      $${pl.netRevenue.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`---`);
  console.log(`COGS (40%):      -$${pl.cogs.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`Ad Spend:        -$${pl.adSpend.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`Shopify Fees:    -$${pl.shopifyFees.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`App Costs:       -$${pl.appCosts.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`---`);
  console.log(`NET PROFIT:       $${pl.netProfit.toFixed(2)}`);
  console.log(`Profit Margin:    ${pl.profitMargin}%`);
  console.log(`AOV:              $${pl.aov}`);
  console.log(`ROAS:             ${pl.roas}x`);
  console.log('='.repeat(50));

  return pl;
}

// Run for last 7 days
const endDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
const startDate = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
generateWeeklyPL(startDate, endDate).catch(console.error);
```

## Design Performance Analysis

Which designs sold this week? Calculate hit rate (designs with orders / total designs tested).

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const SHOP = process.env.SHOPIFY_STORE_DOMAIN || 'becc05-b4.myshopify.com';
const SHOPIFY_TOKEN = process.env.SHOPIFY_ACCESS_TOKEN;

async function analyzeDesignPerformance(startDate, endDate) {
  // Get orders with line items
  const resp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/orders.json?status=any&created_at_min=${startDate}T00:00:00-06:00&created_at_max=${endDate}T23:59:59-06:00&limit=250`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const orders = (await resp.json()).orders || [];

  // Map sales by product
  const productSales = {};
  for (const order of orders) {
    for (const item of (order.line_items || [])) {
      const key = item.product_id;
      if (!productSales[key]) {
        productSales[key] = {
          title: item.title,
          quantity: 0,
          revenue: 0,
          orders: 0
        };
      }
      productSales[key].quantity += item.quantity;
      productSales[key].revenue += parseFloat(item.price) * item.quantity;
      productSales[key].orders++;
    }
  }

  // Get total active products for hit rate
  const countResp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/products/count.json?status=active`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const totalProducts = (await countResp.json()).count || 0;

  const designsWithSales = Object.keys(productSales).length;
  const hitRate = totalProducts > 0 ? (designsWithSales / totalProducts * 100) : 0;

  console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(50));
  console.log('DESIGN PERFORMANCE');
  console.log('='.repeat(50));
  console.log(`Total active products: ${totalProducts}`);
  console.log(`Designs with sales: ${designsWithSales}`);
  console.log(`Hit rate: ${hitRate.toFixed(1)}%`);
  console.log('\nTop sellers:');

  const sorted = Object.values(productSales).sort((a, b) => b.revenue - a.revenue);
  for (const product of sorted.slice(0, 10)) {
    console.log(`  ${product.title}: ${product.quantity} units, $${product.revenue.toFixed(2)}`);
  }

  return { productSales, totalProducts, designsWithSales, hitRate };
}
```

## Category Analysis

Which niches are winning? Track by product tags/categories.

```javascript
async function analyzeCategoryPerformance(startDate, endDate) {
  // Get all products with tags
  const productsResp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/products.json?status=active&limit=250`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const products = (await productsResp.json()).products || [];

  // Build product -> category map from tags
  const productCategory = {};
  const categoryProducts = {};
  for (const p of products) {
    const tags = (p.tags || '').split(',').map(t => t.trim().toLowerCase());
    // Use first non-utility tag as category
    const category = tags.find(t => !['ai-designed', 'new', 'sale', 'bestseller'].includes(t)) || 'uncategorized';
    productCategory[p.id] = category;
    if (!categoryProducts[category]) categoryProducts[category] = [];
    categoryProducts[category].push(p.id);
  }

  // Get orders
  const ordersResp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/orders.json?status=any&created_at_min=${startDate}T00:00:00-06:00&created_at_max=${endDate}T23:59:59-06:00&limit=250`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const orders = (await ordersResp.json()).orders || [];

  // Map sales to categories
  const categoryStats = {};
  for (const order of orders) {
    for (const item of (order.line_items || [])) {
      const cat = productCategory[item.product_id] || 'uncategorized';
      if (!categoryStats[cat]) {
        categoryStats[cat] = { designs: new Set(), sales: 0, revenue: 0 };
      }
      categoryStats[cat].designs.add(item.product_id);
      categoryStats[cat].sales += item.quantity;
      categoryStats[cat].revenue += parseFloat(item.price) * item.quantity;
    }
  }

  console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(60));
  console.log('CATEGORY ANALYSIS');
  console.log('='.repeat(60));
  console.log('Category | Designs Tested | With Sales | Revenue | Hit Rate | Action');
  console.log('-'.repeat(60));

  for (const [cat, stats] of Object.entries(categoryStats).sort((a, b) => b[1].revenue - a[1].revenue)) {
    const tested = (categoryProducts[cat] || []).length;
    const withSales = stats.designs.size;
    const hitRate = tested > 0 ? (withSales / tested * 100) : 0;
    const action = hitRate > 20 ? 'Double down' : hitRate > 5 ? 'Explore more' : 'Maybe pause';
    console.log(`${cat} | ${tested} | ${withSales} | $${stats.revenue.toFixed(2)} | ${hitRate.toFixed(0)}% | ${action}`);
  }

  return categoryStats;
}
```

## Channel Mix Review

Target: 60% paid / 25% email / 15% organic+repeat.

| Channel | Current % | Target % | Status |
|---------|-----------|----------|--------|
| Paid (Meta) | Track | 60% | Scale if ROAS >2.5 |
| Email (Klaviyo) | Track | 25% | Scale flows |
| Organic + Repeat | Track | 15% | SEO + community |

**Why this mix matters:** At 90% paid, you're one bad Meta week from zero revenue. At 60/25/15, you've got three legs holding the table up.

```javascript
async function analyzeChannelMix(startDate, endDate) {
  // Get all orders
  const resp = await fetch(
    `https://${SHOP}/admin/api/2024-01/orders.json?status=any&created_at_min=${startDate}T00:00:00-06:00&created_at_max=${endDate}T23:59:59-06:00&limit=250`,
    { headers: { 'X-Shopify-Access-Token': SHOPIFY_TOKEN } }
  );
  const orders = (await resp.json()).orders || [];

  const emailCodes = ['WELCOME15', 'COMEBACK10', 'MISSYOU15'];
  let paidRevenue = 0;
  let emailRevenue = 0;
  let organicRevenue = 0;
  let totalRevenue = 0;

  for (const order of orders) {
    const revenue = parseFloat(order.total_price || 0);
    totalRevenue += revenue;

    const hasEmailCode = (order.discount_codes || []).some(d => emailCodes.includes(d.code));
    const fromKlaviyo = (order.landing_site || '').includes('utm_source=klaviyo');
    const fromMeta = (order.landing_site || '').includes('utm_source=facebook') ||
                     (order.landing_site || '').includes('utm_source=ig') ||
                     (order.landing_site || '').includes('fbclid=');

    if (hasEmailCode || fromKlaviyo) {
      emailRevenue += revenue;
    } else if (fromMeta) {
      paidRevenue += revenue;
    } else {
      organicRevenue += revenue;
    }
  }

  const paidPct = totalRevenue > 0 ? (paidRevenue / totalRevenue * 100) : 0;
  const emailPct = totalRevenue > 0 ? (emailRevenue / totalRevenue * 100) : 0;
  const organicPct = totalRevenue > 0 ? (organicRevenue / totalRevenue * 100) : 0;

  console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(50));
  console.log('CHANNEL MIX');
  console.log('='.repeat(50));
  console.log(`Paid (Meta):      $${paidRevenue.toFixed(2)} (${paidPct.toFixed(0)}%) | Target: 60%`);
  console.log(`Email (Klaviyo):  $${emailRevenue.toFixed(2)} (${emailPct.toFixed(0)}%) | Target: 25%`);
  console.log(`Organic+Repeat:   $${organicRevenue.toFixed(2)} (${organicPct.toFixed(0)}%) | Target: 15%`);

  return { paidRevenue, emailRevenue, organicRevenue, totalRevenue, paidPct, emailPct, organicPct };
}
```

## Budget Recommendations

Based on 14-day ROAS trends:

| ROAS Trend | Recommendation |
|------------|---------------|
| Rising and >3.0x | Increase daily budget 20% |
| Stable 2.0-3.0x | Hold, optimize creative |
| Declining but >2.0x | Refresh creative, hold budget |
| Below 2.0x | Decrease 20%, audit creative + landing pages |
| Below 1.0x | Emergency pause, full audit |

```javascript
async function generateBudgetRecommendation() {
  // Get 14-day ad performance, split into two 7-day windows
  const now = new Date();
  const week1Start = new Date(now - 14 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const week1End = new Date(now - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const week2Start = week1End;
  const week2End = now.toISOString().split('T')[0];

  // Pull Meta insights for both weeks
  const [resp1, resp2] = await Promise.all([
    fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/insights?fields=spend,actions,action_values&time_range={"since":"${week1Start}","until":"${week1End}"}&access_token=${FB_TOKEN}`),
    fetch(`${API_BASE}/${AD_ACCOUNT}/insights?fields=spend,actions,action_values&time_range={"since":"${week2Start}","until":"${week2End}"}&access_token=${FB_TOKEN}`)
  ]);

  const [data1, data2] = await Promise.all([resp1.json(), resp2.json()]);

  function extractRoas(data) {
    const insights = data.data?.[0];
    if (!insights) return 0;
    const spend = parseFloat(insights.spend || 0);
    let revenue = 0;
    for (const av of (insights.action_values || [])) {
      if (av.action_type === 'omni_purchase') revenue = parseFloat(av.value);
    }
    return spend > 0 ? revenue / spend : 0;
  }

  const roas1 = extractRoas(data1);
  const roas2 = extractRoas(data2);
  const trend = roas2 - roas1;

  let recommendation = '';
  if (roas2 > 3.0 && trend > 0) {
    recommendation = 'SCALE: Increase daily budget 20%. ROAS is rising and above 3.0x.';
  } else if (roas2 >= 2.0 && roas2 <= 3.0) {
    recommendation = 'HOLD: ROAS is stable between 2.0-3.0x. Optimize creative for improvement.';
  } else if (roas2 >= 2.0 && trend < 0) {
    recommendation = 'CAUTION: ROAS declining but still above 2.0x. Refresh creative, hold budget.';
  } else if (roas2 >= 1.0 && roas2 < 2.0) {
    recommendation = 'DECREASE: ROAS below 2.0x. Decrease budget 20%. Audit creative and landing pages.';
  } else if (roas2 < 1.0) {
    recommendation = 'EMERGENCY: ROAS below 1.0x. Pause scaling campaigns. Full audit needed.';
  }

  console.log('\nBUDGET RECOMMENDATION:');
  console.log(`Week 1 ROAS: ${roas1.toFixed(2)}x`);
  console.log(`Week 2 ROAS: ${roas2.toFixed(2)}x`);
  console.log(`Trend: ${trend > 0 ? 'Rising' : trend < 0 ? 'Declining' : 'Flat'}`);
  console.log(recommendation);

  return { roas1, roas2, trend, recommendation };
}
```

## Strategic Pivot Recommendations

Based on the week's data, generate strategic recommendations:

```javascript
function generateStrategicPivots(pl, designStats, categoryStats, channelMix) {
  const pivots = [];

  // 1. Category guidance
  for (const [cat, stats] of Object.entries(categoryStats)) {
    const hitRate = stats.designs.size / (stats.tested || 1) * 100;
    if (hitRate > 20) {
      pivots.push(`DOUBLE DOWN on "${cat}" category (${hitRate.toFixed(0)}% hit rate). Create 10+ more designs in this niche.`);
    } else if (hitRate < 5 && stats.tested > 5) {
      pivots.push(`CONSIDER PAUSING "${cat}" category. ${stats.tested} designs tested, only ${hitRate.toFixed(0)}% hit rate.`);
    }
  }

  // 2. Pricing and bundling
  if (pl.aov < 35) {
    pivots.push(`AOV is $${pl.aov}. Consider: bundle pricing ("2 for $50"), free shipping threshold at $50, "complete the look" recommendations.`);
  }

  // 3. Channel mix
  if (channelMix.paidPct > 80) {
    pivots.push(`${channelMix.paidPct.toFixed(0)}% of revenue from paid. Too dependent on Meta. Prioritize email flow activation and SEO.`);
  }

  // 4. Profit margin
  if (pl.profitMargin < 10) {
    pivots.push(`Profit margin at ${pl.profitMargin}%. Need to either increase prices, reduce ad spend, or grow email/organic channels.`);
  } else if (pl.profitMargin > 25) {
    pivots.push(`Profit margin at ${pl.profitMargin}%. Healthy. Consider reinvesting into more design testing and ad spend.`);
  }

  // 5. Design velocity
  if (designStats.hitRate < 5) {
    pivots.push(`Design hit rate ${designStats.hitRate.toFixed(1)}%. Either improve design quality or narrow niche focus.`);
  }

  // 6. Creative refresh
  if (pl.roas < 2.0 && pl.adSpend > 50) {
    pivots.push('ROAS below 2.0x with meaningful spend. Priority: refresh ad creative. New lifestyle mockups, new copy variants.');
  }

  console.log('\n' + '='.repeat(50));
  console.log('STRATEGIC PIVOTS');
  console.log('='.repeat(50));
  for (let i = 0; i < pivots.length; i++) {
    console.log(`${i + 1}. ${pivots[i]}`);
  }

  return pivots;
}
```

## Report Delivery

Email full report to whoisjonray@gmail.com via Resend. Post summary to Discord. Update MEMORY.md.

```javascript
require('dotenv').config({ override: true });

const RESEND_KEY = process.env.RESEND_FULL_ACCESS_KEY;

async function sendWeeklyReport(pl, designStats, categoryStats, channelMix, budgetRec, pivots) {
  const html = `
    <div style="max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;font-family:monospace;color:#333;background:#fafafa;padding:30px">
      <h1 style="color:#000;border-bottom:2px solid #000;padding-bottom:10px">TRESR Weekly P&L: ${pl.period}</h1>

      <h2>Profit & Loss</h2>
      <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse">
        <tr><td>Gross Revenue</td><td style="text-align:right"><strong>$${pl.grossRevenue.toFixed(2)}</strong> (${pl.orderCount} orders)</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Returns/Refunds</td><td style="text-align:right;color:#c00">-$${pl.refunds.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-top:1px solid #ccc"><td>Net Revenue</td><td style="text-align:right">$${pl.netRevenue.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr><td>COGS (40%)</td><td style="text-align:right;color:#c00">-$${pl.cogs.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Ad Spend</td><td style="text-align:right;color:#c00">-$${pl.adSpend.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr><td>Shopify Fees</td><td style="text-align:right;color:#c00">-$${pl.shopifyFees.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr><td>App Costs</td><td style="text-align:right;color:#c00">-$${pl.appCosts.toFixed(2)}</td></tr>
        <tr style="border-top:2px solid #000;font-size:18px"><td><strong>Net Profit</strong></td><td style="text-align:right;color:${pl.netProfit >= 0 ? '#060' : '#c00'}"><strong>$${pl.netProfit.toFixed(2)}</strong></td></tr>
        <tr><td>Profit Margin</td><td style="text-align:right">${pl.profitMargin}%</td></tr>
        <tr><td>ROAS</td><td style="text-align:right">${pl.roas}x</td></tr>
        <tr><td>AOV</td><td style="text-align:right">$${pl.aov}</td></tr>
      </table>

      <h2>Design Performance</h2>
      <p>Hit rate: ${designStats.hitRate.toFixed(1)}% (${designStats.designsWithSales} of ${designStats.totalProducts} designs sold)</p>

      <h2>Channel Mix</h2>
      <p>Paid: ${channelMix.paidPct.toFixed(0)}% | Email: ${channelMix.emailPct.toFixed(0)}% | Organic: ${channelMix.organicPct.toFixed(0)}%</p>
      <p>Target: 60% / 25% / 15%</p>

      <h2>Budget Recommendation</h2>
      <p>${budgetRec.recommendation}</p>

      <h2>Strategic Pivots</h2>
      <ol>${pivots.map(p => `<li>${p}</li>`).join('')}</ol>

      <p style="color:#999;margin-top:30px;font-size:12px">Generated by TRESR Weekly Profit Review</p>
    </div>
  `;

  await fetch('https://api.resend.com/emails', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
      'Authorization': `Bearer ${RESEND_KEY}`,
      'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      from: 'Rez from TRESR <notabot@tresr.com>',
      to: ['whoisjonray@gmail.com'],
      subject: `TRESR Weekly P&L: $${pl.netProfit.toFixed(2)} profit (${pl.profitMargin}% margin)`,
      html
    })
  });

  console.log('Weekly report emailed to whoisjonray@gmail.com');
}
```

### MEMORY.md Update

After generating the report, append a summary to MEMORY.md for historical tracking:

```javascript
const fs = require('fs');

function updateMemory(pl, designStats, pivots) {
  const memoryPath = '/Users/user/Documents/Cursor Clients/client-tresr/MEMORY.md';
  const entry = `
## Weekly Review: ${pl.period}
- Net Revenue: $${pl.netRevenue.toFixed(2)} | Net Profit: $${pl.netProfit.toFixed(2)} (${pl.profitMargin}% margin)
- Orders: ${pl.orderCount} | AOV: $${pl.aov} | ROAS: ${pl.roas}x
- Design hit rate: ${designStats.hitRate.toFixed(1)}%
- Ad Spend: $${pl.adSpend.toFixed(2)}
- Top pivots: ${pivots.slice(0, 2).join('; ')}
`;

  fs.appendFileSync(memoryPath, entry);
  console.log('MEMORY.md updated with weekly review');
}
```

## Full Weekly Review Runner

Orchestrates all the pieces into one Sunday evening run.

```javascript
async function runWeeklyReview() {
  const endDate = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
  const startDate = new Date(Date.now() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000).toISOString().split('T')[0];

  console.log(`Running weekly review for ${startDate} to ${endDate}...\n`);

  // 1. P&L
  const pl = await generateWeeklyPL(startDate, endDate);

  // 2. Design performance
  const designStats = await analyzeDesignPerformance(startDate, endDate);

  // 3. Category analysis
  const categoryStats = await analyzeCategoryPerformance(startDate, endDate);

  // 4. Channel mix
  const channelMix = await analyzeChannelMix(startDate, endDate);

  // 5. Budget recommendation
  const budgetRec = await generateBudgetRecommendation();

  // 6. Strategic pivots
  const pivots = generateStrategicPivots(pl, designStats, categoryStats, channelMix);

  // 7. Send report
  await sendWeeklyReport(pl, designStats, categoryStats, channelMix, budgetRec, pivots);

  // 8. Update MEMORY.md
  updateMemory(pl, designStats, pivots);

  console.log('\nWeekly review complete.');
}

runWeeklyReview().catch(console.error);
```

## Foundation: pricing-strategy + analytics-tracking (coreyhaines31/marketingskills)

This skill references pricing models for POD unit economics, bundle strategy, and free shipping thresholds from the pricing-strategy framework. It also uses analytics tracking patterns to complement our Shopify + Meta + GSC setup. Our implementation adds:

- **POD-specific P&L calculations** with 40% COGS for print-on-demand margins
- **Design hit rate tracking** unique to high-volume POD stores testing many designs
- **Category analysis** to identify which niches produce winners
- **Meta + Shopify + GA4 data fusion** into a single weekly view
- **Automated report delivery** via Resend email

The general framework's principles still apply: track unit economics obsessively, price for profitability not just revenue, and let data drive decisions.

## Scoring Rubric

| Metric | Score | Weight |
|--------|-------|--------|
| Net profit margin > 20% | 0-10 | 25% |
| Design hit rate improving week-over-week | 0-10 | 20% |
| Channel mix moving toward 60/25/15 target | 0-10 | 20% |
| ROAS trending up or stable | 0-10 | 20% |
| Strategic recommendations actioned | 0-10 | 15% |

**Scoring details:**
- 10 = significantly exceeding target
- 7 = hitting target
- 5 = making progress toward target
- 3 = below target, needs attention
- 0 = not implemented or broken

## Integration Points

- **tresr-daily-scorecard**: Pulls daily data history to compute weekly aggregates. The daily scorecard is the raw data, the weekly review is the analysis
- **tresr-trend-scout**: Feeds category guidance (which niches to explore, which to abandon)
- **tresr-meta-ads-autopilot**: Informs budget changes based on 14-day ROAS trends
- **tresr-email-revenue-engine**: Tracks email channel contribution to overall revenue mix
- **tresr-design-factory / tresr-design-scorer**: Design hit rate data influences which design styles and categories to prioritize
- **tresr-store-conversion-optimizer**: Weekly CR and AOV trends feed into CRO priorities
